docs.title: Michael Scarborough Technical Writing Portfolio
docs.text:
Welcome to my technical writing portfolio.

I am a technical writer and editor with a background in macOS systems engineering and enterprise IT. My experience includes user guides, administrator documentation, process documentation, knowledge base content, and technical editing.

docs.title: About
docs.text:
I am a technical writer and editor with a background in macOS systems engineering and enterprise IT. My work includes administrator documentation, technical editing, knowledge base content, workflows, and user-focused instructions.

This portfolio showcases selected documentation samples, with project source materials hosted on GitHub.

docs.title: Atari Computer User Guide
docs.text: A Markdown-based user guide created to apply technical writing principles to legacy computer documentation. This sample demonstrates step-by-step instructions, hardware setup guidance, and troubleshooting content for users familiar with modern computers but new to older systems.

docs.title: Project Overview
docs.text:
Read the project overview PDF for audience, goals, challenges, tools, and results.

  • Atari User Guide Overview
  • View Source Files on GitHub

docs.title: Migrate User Administrative Tool Documentation
docs.text: This sample documents an AppleScript-based administrative tool for restoring ownership and group permissions to a migrated user's home folder after a Mac has been reimaged. The project includes a polished administrator README and a revised script with clearer prompts, improved warnings, maintainable comments, and more administrator-focused messaging.
